_publications._publicationTitle: Graph complexity analysis identifies an ETV5 tumor-specific network in human and murine low-grade glioma.

_contextSnippet: Etv5 protein expression was also observed in optic glioma tissue, but not in normal healthy optic nerves, by immunohistochemistry with an Etv5-specific antibody
details: Successfully detected Etv5 protein expression in optic glioma tissue but not in normal optic nerves by immunohistochemistry on paraffin-embedded formalin-fixed specimens
